name: Super Hero I.T. Software
short_description: You are the I.T. Department's lowest paid security grunt, and a hacker is malware-bombing the company network. Your shift ends in an hour. The break room coffee pot is cold. Log in, 'cause it's gonna be a long night.
detailed_description:
Superhero I.T. Software currently has 10 levels.

Log in and defend the company network from the virus invasion, or lose your sysadmin privileges trying.

Use a variety of system tools to fend off hordes of virus bugs which seek to compromise the network's process kernels. Collect permission powerups and face off against a variety of hostile malwares trying to get in your way.

Secure the network with firewalls, or counter-compromise the hacker's malware processes before your kernels are cracked by the attack.
